title: dianthus angrenicus
intro: Dianthus angrenicus, also known as the Iranian pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus angrenicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Dianthus angrenicus can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
